name: Navjiwan Chembur Sindhi Society
summary: One centrally controlled system spanning a 32-society complex, with intelligent loop planning that saved significant wiring.
challenge: A 32-society complex needed to be monitored as one — but connecting that many buildings naively would have meant a costly, sprawling tangle of cable.
solution: Konect deployed 110 cameras on 8 NVRs under central control, using intelligent loop planning and underground wiring for inter-society connectivity to cut cable runs dramatically.
result: The entire 32-society complex is managed from one control point, with a clean underground backbone that saved significant wiring cost and disruption.
